modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty signing up team members in Microsoft Teams

full_description_text: 
The user is trying to sign up team members in Microsoft Teams. They are not sure how to do it correctly. There seems to be some confusion about the process.

description: The user is trying to sign up team members in Microsoft Teams. They are not sure how to do it correctly. There seems to be some confusion about the process.
